meta.title: Prime Nexus — IT Consulting & Technology Strategy
meta.description: Prime Nexus is an IT consulting firm helping organizations deliver secure, scalable, and user-centric technology. Cloud, data, cybersecurity, and digital transformation—done right.
meta.ogDescription: Secure, scalable, and user-centric technology consulting. Cloud • Data • Cybersecurity • Modernization.

hero.badge: Trusted IT Consulting • Cloud • Data • Cybersecurity
hero.title: Build secure, scalable systems that move your business forward.
hero.desc: Prime Nexus partners with teams to design, modernize, and operate technology that actually serves the business. From cloud architecture and data platforms to security hardening and delivery coaching—our consultants ship results, not buzzwords.

cloud.title: Cloud & Platform
cloud.text: Landing zones, Kubernetes, DevOps, cost optimization, and SRE to keep systems reliable and affordable.

data.title: Data & Analytics
data.text: Warehouses, ELT/ETL, real-time pipelines, governance, and dashboards that drive decisions.

security.title: Cybersecurity
security.text: Zero-trust architectures, IAM, threat modeling, compliance readiness, and security reviews.

delivery.title: Delivery & Modernization
delivery.text: Legacy re-platforming, API design, agile coaching, and product enablement for faster outcomes.

kpis.title: Compliance & Risk Impact
kpis.lost: Estimated lost revenue from GDPR, HIPAA, PCI DSS, ISO 27001, SOX gaps

services.title: Services
services.sub: Engagements sized to your goals—from short assessments to full delivery squads.

arch.title: Architecture & Roadmaps
arch.text: Hands-on discovery and technical strategy tied to business outcomes, plus a pragmatic plan to execute.

devops.title: DevOps & Automation
devops.text: CI/CD, infrastructure as code, observability, incident response, and performance tuning.

security.title: Security & Compliance
security.text: Security baselines, SOC 2 / ISO prep, cloud security posture management, and risk reduction.

apps.title: Applications & APIs
apps.text: Microservices, integrations, and migrations—with maintainability and developer happiness baked in.

bi.title: Analytics & BI
bi.text: Modern data stack selection, modeling, governance, and KPI dashboards aligned to teams.

staff.title: Staff Augmentation
staff.text: Experienced engineers, analysts, and security specialists to accelerate delivery.

industries.title: Industries
industries.sub: We meet you where you are—startup, scale-up, or enterprise.

fin.title: Fintech & Payments
fin.text: Low-latency systems, PCI alignment, fraud prevention, and auditability.

health.title: Healthcare
health.text: HIPAA-aware architectures, interoperability, and data privacy by design.

retail.title: Retail & eCommerce
retail.text: Peak-season reliability, personalization, and analytics to boost LTV.

step1.title: Discovery & Alignment.
step1.text: We connect the tech to the metrics that matter and map constraints early.

step2.title: Design & Plan.
step2.text: Architecture, security baselines, and a delivery plan that minimizes risk.

step3.title: Build & Enable.
step3.text: Pair with your team, automate relentlessly, and deliver in small, testable slices.

step4.title: Run & Improve.
step4.text: Observability, SLOs, and cost visibility to keep systems healthy and budgets sane.

about.title: About Prime Nexus
about.sub: A senior team of architects, data engineers, and security specialists who enjoy solving messy problems.

why.title: Why us
why.text: No black boxes. We work in the open, enable your team, and leave you stronger than we found you.

how.title: How we engage
how.text: Fixed-scope assessments, outcome-based projects, or embedded specialists—whichever drives results quickest.

contact.title: Let’s talk
contact.sub: Tell us a bit about your goals and challenges. We’ll respond within one business day.

message.label: What can we help with?
message.placeholder: Briefly describe your project or challenge
